stages.representation: three convergent inline-PTX kernels covering the admitted tcgen05 commit and shift controls
stages.detail: Pinned LLVM 22 retained three entries and the three exact instructions from the 1,180-byte source (SHA-256 c9d6009791b64f0871bf7d007d85d381ba94d1125070ebcdac4c7f0fcb652e13). PTX SHA-256: sm_100a/+ptx86 fe1818fb3e1217277df5f8922dc413380c8d13ee6a94f35401182aff0e875554; sm_101a/+ptx86 f78d319d104c813972755fb159f0a3f947c9a28e145af19dae04e79bd4711b35; sm_103a/+ptx88 44e7d4fd8b50b0973a5db7652603703b7bef6981e324fcfdcbaa94a929cb46d5; sm_110a/+ptx90 f4fd13829114b6240d81c6e8eef90994cef310201a4d0c989b9af4f107e35017. A separate direct-intrinsic fixture (SHA-256 5d6f385d95b18564caed76220ac69296e1e625ae6d98c0c48e6311d8df034c21) emitted the same instructions on those targets. Direct PTX SHA-256: c4ae06b9fd3894dc070c1e86c5addb338b9fb6a7c80ab3b15bff961cd5264325; 99b083ffd590e834dfa45f3f5e86ca00b4d98863308bef0912a24d337303c22c; 86671718d828e2082b66c67a4e89ef49abef80186db1b2618b579b7b1b4475ad; 1a782892745df5e6647c6c1827f8b515905d76ec49dfc6f84a563b1faa6f5599, in target order above.

stages.representation: isolated direct-intrinsic probes at and outside the imported selection predicates
stages.detail: Pinned LLVM rejected sm_100a and sm_101a at PTX 8.5, sm_103a at PTX 8.7, and sm_110a at PTX 8.8. Both shift records also rejected every tested base and family target. The commit record separately passed sm_100f/sm_101f/sm_103f at PTX 8.8 and sm_110f at PTX 9.0. All three records rejected sm_120 and sm_121 spellings. This closes the shared route to sm_100a, sm_101a, sm_103a, and sm_110a at their proved floors.

stages.representation: LLVM-produced PTX containing the three exact tcgen05 controls
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted sm_100a, sm_103a, and sm_110a. Cubin SHA-256: 88743111f57596a0c77bafe054764c63b5dafe8f4a72a49e35aabe41865feeba; 8e50db9432c58adb4ed83badb4984720f7592aeba322ff3b97740e0caf31c486; cdead147e86914c22f5fde7a325f142c2e88f0dc56a8261056937eadeb9bec24, in target order. CUDA 13.3 has no sm_101a assembler spelling. Each cubin has one UTCBAR.MULTICAST, one UTCSHIFT.DOWN, and one UTCSHIFT.2CTA.DOWN.

stages.representation: the same three inline instructions emitted for excluded family and future targets
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas rejected tcgen05.shift on sm_100f, sm_103f, and sm_110f. It rejected tcgen05.commit and tcgen05.shift on sm_120a/f and sm_121a/f.
